name: '..Perhaps you will be guided to the right way' is indicative here of the regal
introduction:
appropriate for God's address to His creatures. The indication from a soverign, while
addressing his slave, that the latter could expect some favour from him is quite enough to
make that slave rejoice and celebrate.
